title: Ancient palace discovery challenges the myth behind Sparta's rise to power
description: New historical research challenges Sparta's founding myth, suggesting the ancient warrior state did not start out through conquest, as experts have long believed.

title: UCF-Led Excavation Reveals Evidence of Life, Conflict in Ancient Mesopotamia
description: New discoveries from a UCF-led excavation in the Kurdistan region of Iraq, near the city of Erbil, are reshaping what researchers know about how ancient cities lived, governed and fell.

title: Scientists Say These Ancient Black Holes May Never Fully Evaporate, Surviving Instead as Tiny White Holes
description: What if the smallest black holes never truly vanish? A new study points to an outcome few researchers expected.

title: Great mysteries of archaeology: an ancient Amazonian world revealed from the sky
description: Archaeologists thought ancient Amazonia was only home to wandering people, but new technology has uncovered complex societies living in forest cities.

title: Great mysteries of archaeology: an ancient Amazonian world revealed from the sky - The Conversation
description: Great mysteries of archaeology: an ancient Amazonian world revealed from the sky The Conversation
